competitors.name: Cursor
competitors.raw_snapshot:
来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文

Version 3.3 (May 6, 2026):
- /multitask command for running async subagents to parallelize requests
- Context usage breakdown visibility for agents
- Improved prompt input undo grouping for more natural edits
- Various improvements to long-chat handling, MCP connections, and terminal interaction bugs

Composer 2.5 Release:
- A smarter model for long-running tasks with improved collaboration and stronger training on complex instructions
- Better at sustained work on long-running tasks and follows complex instructions more reliably

Team Marketplace:
- Team marketplace setup without requiring a repository, allowing admins to create a team marketplace first
- Add, remove, and configure install behavior for first-party plugins in team marketplace settings

Development Environment Improvements:
- Cursor can configure Dockerfiles by inspecting repos and determining required tools and dependencies
- Every development environment now has version history that users can review and roll back

Bugbot Updates:
- Bugbot switched to usage-based billing for Teams and Individual plans, removing seat fees
- Bugbot now includes the ability to self-improve in real time and has MCP support
competitors.content_hash:
来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文

Version 3.3 (May 6, 2026):
- /multitask command for running async subagents to parallelize requests
- Context

changes.description: 新增 /multitask 命令，可并行运行异步子 agent，在同一工作流中同时执行多个 AI 任务
changes.evidence: 「/multitask command for running async subagents to parallelize requests」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：AI = 快 session，多个 AI session 并行执行，向「多 agent 同协议并发」方向延伸

changes.description: Composer 2.5：专为长时任务优化的新模型，持续工作能力显著提升
changes.evidence: 「A smarter model for long-running tasks with improved collaboration and stronger training on complex instructions」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：专门为长时 AI session（持续工作任务）优化的模型层

changes.description: Bugbot 可「实时自我改进」并支持 MCP，计费改为按用量
changes.evidence: 「Bugbot now includes the ability to self-improve in real time and has MCP support」

changes.description: 开发环境版本历史：每个环境现有可回滚的版本历史
changes.evidence: 「Every development environment now has version history that users can review and roll back」

key_findings: /multitask 命令支持并发异步子 agent，AI 并行多 session 执行能力正式作为命令暴露给用户
Composer 2.5 专为长时任务设计，Bugbot 支持自我改进 + MCP，Cursor 向「持续后台 agent」方向演化

competitors.name: Claude.ai
competitors.raw_snapshot:
来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文

Live Artifacts (introduced April 2026):
- Dashboards and trackers that refresh with current data every time you reopen them, staying connected to data sources for KPI monitoring, pipeline tracking, and content calendars without manual updates.

Artifacts Enhancements:
- Artifacts can now call Claude's API directly — build intelligent micro-applications where AI runs inside the artifact itself
- Artifacts now support Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers, enabling direct connections to Google Calendar, Gmail, Slack, and more
- Community catalog: browse and remix artifacts other people have built

Computer Use (March 23, 2026):
- Research preview for Pro and Max subscribers
- Claude can point, click, and navigate your screen, open apps, use the browser, fill in forms, and operate any tool on your computer

Claude Code features:
- Routines, /ultrareview, Auto Mode, Ultrathink, Subagents, Hooks, Plugins

Chat features:
- Claude Design, Inline Interactive Charts, Output Styles, Fork, /btw, /rewind, /recap

Projects:
- Pro and Team users can organize chats into Projects with curated knowledge sets
- Share best chats with teammates
competitors.content_hash:
来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文

Live Artifacts (introduced April 2026):
- Dashboards and trackers that refresh with current data every time you reopen them, staying connected

changes.description: Live Artifacts（4月上线）：连接数据源的动态仪表盘，每次打开自动刷新最新数据，非快照
changes.evidence: 「dashboards and trackers that refresh with current data every time you reopen them, staying connected to data sources」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #2：跨工具 artifact live link（不是 snapshot），Claude 已实现 artifact 与数据源的持久连接

changes.description: Artifacts 可直接调用 Claude API，可内嵌 MCP server 连接 Calendar/Gmail/Slack 等外部工具
changes.evidence: 「Artifacts can now call Claude's API directly... Artifacts now support Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers, enabling direct connections to external services like Google Calendar, Gmail, Slack」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #4：artifact 直接 pull 外部数据源，跨工具跨 owner 的 artifact 连接

changes.description: Computer Use 研究预览（3月23日）：Claude 可操控屏幕点击、打开应用、填写表单
changes.evidence: 「Computer Use shipped March 23 as a research preview for Claude Pro and Max subscribers, allowing Claude to point, click, and navigate your screen」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #5 边缘：AI 直接操作外部工具，与 peripheral 层交互逻辑重叠

changes.description: Claude Code 新增 Routines、Subagents、Hooks、Auto Mode；聊天层新增 /rewind、/recap、Fork
changes.evidence: 「Code got Routines, /ultrareview, Auto Mode, Ultrathink, Subagents, Hooks, and Plugins」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：Subagents + Routines 构成人类 session 调度 AI 快速 session 的完整框架

key_findings: Live Artifacts 直接实现「artifact live link 非 snapshot」——数据源持久连接，每次打开自动刷新，与 meee2 锚点 #2 高度重叠
Artifacts 内嵌 MCP server 连接外部工具（Calendar/Gmail/Slack），触碰锚点 #4（跨工具跨 owner artifact pull）
Claude Code 的 Routines + Subagents 体系，构建了人+AI session 调度框架

competitors.name: GitHub Copilot
competitors.raw_snapshot:
来源：直接抓取 github.com/features/copilot + WebSearch 补充

Core Positioning: "Your AI accelerator for every workflow, from the editor to the enterprise."

Agent Capabilities:
"Assign tasks to agents like Copilot, Claude by Anthropic, and OpenAI Codex, and let them plan, explore, and execute work autonomously."

May 13, 2026 — Copilot CLI agent and unified sessions view in JetBrains IDEs:
- Unified sessions view shows live status for running and queued sessions
- Delegate tasks from JetBrains IDEs to a locally running GitHub Copilot CLI agent
- Worktree isolation: runs the agent in a separate Git worktree so changes don't affect your current branch until you choose to review and apply them
- Workspace isolation: applies changes directly to your current workspace
- Ask question tool: agents can ask focused clarifying questions when additional information is needed
- Global .agent.md support: define custom agents at the global level under ~/.copilot/agents, available across all workspaces

Pricing: Free (50 agent requests/month), Pro ($10/month unlimited agent mode), Pro+ ($39/month all models including Claude Opus)
competitors.content_hash:
来源：直接抓取 github.com/features/copilot + WebSearch 补充

Core Positioning: "Your AI accelerator for every workflow, from the editor to the enterprise."

Agent Cap

changes.description: JetBrains IDE 引入「统一 sessions 视图」：实时显示运行中和排队中的 agent session 状态
changes.evidence: 「unified sessions view that shows live status for running and queued sessions」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：在 IDE 中统一展示 agent session 状态（运行中/排队中），向「同一协议管理不同类型 session」方向演化

changes.description: Worktree 隔离模式：agent 在独立 git worktree 中运行，变更不影响当前分支直至主动合并
changes.evidence: 「Worktree isolation runs the agent in a separate Git worktree so changes don't affect your current branch until you choose to review and apply them」

changes.description: 全局 .agent.md 配置：跨所有 workspace 的 agent 统一定义文件
changes.evidence: 「global .agent.md support: define custom agents at the global level under ~/.copilot/agents, making them available across all your workspaces」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #4：跨工具跨 workspace 的统一 agent 配置层

key_findings: 新增「统一 sessions 视图」：实时显示 agent session 状态（运行中/排队中），首次将 session 概念显式化到 IDE UI 层
全局 agent 配置（.agent.md）覆盖所有 workspace，朝跨工具 agent 协议方向演进

competitors.name: Linear
competitors.raw_snapshot:
来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文

Linear Agent (公开 beta, March 24, 2026):
- Agent and Skills included on all Linear plans
- Automations and Code Intelligence available on Business and Enterprise

Skills:
- When a conversation gets you to a good result, you can ask Linear to save it as a reusable skill
- Especially useful for recurring workflows, like catching up on projects or drafting issues from meeting notes

Automations:
- Trigger agent workflows automatically when issues enter triage
- Linear can intelligently help refine, synthesize, or act on issues

Code Intelligence (May 14, 2026):
- Extends Linear Agent's understanding to your codebase
- Supports code-aware tasks like diagnosing app functionality and designing technical specifications

Deeplink to AI Coding Tools (Feb 2026):
- Launch preferred coding tool directly from a Linear issue
- Prefilled prompt includes issue ID, description, comments, updates, linked references, images

Release Notes Generation:
- Generate release notes with Linear Agent based on included issues

Slack Integration:
- In a project's Slack channel, use @Linear to answer questions or take actions

The Register headline: "Linear adopts agentic AI as CEO declares issue tracking dead"
competitors.content_hash:
来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文

Linear Agent (公开 beta, March 24, 2026):
- Agent and Skills included on all Linear plans
- Automations and Code Intelligence available o

changes.description: Linear Agent 公开 beta（3月）：全计划包含 Agent + Skills，CEO 宣布「issue tracking is dead」
changes.evidence: 「Linear adopts agentic AI as CEO declares issue tracking dead」

changes.description: Skills：将对话结果保存为可复用技能，用于重复性工作流（如从会议记录起草 issue）
changes.evidence: 「When a conversation gets you to a good result, you can ask Linear to save it as a reusable skill, which is especially useful for recurring workflows」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #3：Descriptive-first——从真实行为（对话）emerge 出 flow（skill），与 meee2 核心抽象方向一致

changes.description: Automations：当 issue 进入 triage 时自动触发 agent 工作流
changes.evidence: 「Trigger agent workflows automatically when issues enter triage」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：issue 事件驱动 AI 快速 session 自动执行

changes.description: Code Intelligence（5月14日）：agent 理解代码库，支持代码感知任务（诊断功能、设计技术规格）
changes.evidence: 「Code Intelligence extends Linear Agent's understanding to your codebase, supporting code-aware tasks like diagnosing app functionality and designing technical specifications」

key_findings: Linear Skills「从对话 emerge 出可复用工作流」——与 meee2 的 descriptive-first 范式高度重叠，需持续跟踪
CEO 宣布「issue tracking is dead」，Linear 正在转型为 AI agent 工作协调平台

competitors.name: Notion AI
competitors.raw_snapshot:
来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文

Notion Developer Platform (May 13, 2026) — v3.5 release:
- Extends custom AI agents, connects with external agents, and allows teams to build automated multistep workflows pulling data from any database

Notion Workers:
- Hosted runtime for custom code; deploy through CLI, run in secure sandbox
- Free during beta; Workers run on Notion credits starting August 11, 2026

Custom Agents (launched February 2026):
- AI teammates handling repetitive tasks: answering FAQs, compiling status updates, automating workflows
- Over 1 million custom agents built by Notion customers

External Agents API (May 2026):
- Brings third-party agents into Notion: Claude, Codex, Decagon partnerships pre-configured
- Pre-configured integrations: Linear, Figma, HubSpot, Ramp, Wiz, Stripe, GitHub, Intercom, Amplitude, Attio, Sentry

AI Connectors:
- Slack, Google Drive, GitHub, Jira, Microsoft Teams, OneDrive, SharePoint, Salesforce, Box
- Custom Agents can read and reply in private Slack channels

Database Sync:
- Sync any data source with an API into Notion databases, no servers needed, powered by Workers

Custom Agent controls for admins (May 5, 2026)
competitors.content_hash:
来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文

Notion Developer Platform (May 13, 2026) — v3.5 release:
- Extends custom AI agents, connects with external agents, and allows teams

changes.description: Notion Developer Platform（3.5，5月13日）：开放外部 agent API，Notion 变身多 agent 接入中枢
changes.evidence: 「Notion just turned its workspace into a hub for AI agents」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #4：Notion 作为跨工具 artifact 聚合层，但实现路径是「外部 agent 接入 Notion」而非「从任意工具 pull artifact」

changes.description: External Agents API：Claude、Codex、Decagon 等外部 agent 原生接入，以及 Linear/Figma/GitHub 等 20+ 集成

changes.description: Database Sync + Workers：任意 API 数据源同步进 Notion 数据库，服务端托管执行
changes.evidence: 「sync any data source with an API into their Notion databases with no servers for teams to manage, powered by Workers that run on Notion infrastructure」

key_findings: Notion 从笔记工具转向「AI agent 中枢平台」，100万+ 自定义 agent，External Agents API 开放第三方接入
AI Connectors 覆盖主流工具（Slack/GitHub/Jira/Teams等），数据同步进 Notion 而非从 Notion 出去，与 meee2 方向相反

competitors.name: Slack
competitors.raw_snapshot:
来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文

Redesigned Slackbot (general availability on Business+/Enterprise+):
- Transformed from notification tool into full AI agent
- Can search enterprise data, draft documents, take action on behalf of employees

Multi-Agent Coordination:
- Slackbot can coordinate responses in real-time from multiple agents (Analytics Agent, Sales Agent, etc.)
- Automatically draft an account strategy canvas when asked for an expansion plan
- Retrieve sales deck from Box, find a time on Google Calendar, all in a single organized thread

AI Response Generation in Workflows (April 21-30, 2026):
- AI is now a native part of any workflow in Slack
- New 'Generate AI Response' step: write a prompt, point at knowledge sources (channels, canvases, lists), LLM does the work
- Rolling out to Business+ v2 and Enterprise+ plans

Agent Development Tools:
- Single 'slack create agent' command
- Enhanced Bolt framework support, bring-your-own-LLM flexibility
- Open-source sample apps: Starter Agent, Support Agent
- Support for Claude SDK, OpenAI SDK, and Pydantic AI

Raycast 2.0 Public Beta:

competitors.content_hash:

Raycast 2.0 Public Beta:
- macOS + Windows support
- Redesigned Liquid Glass interface
- AI voice dictation across apps
- Files

changes.description: Raycast 2.0（macOS+Windows）：Presets 正式更名为 Agents，Skills 系统动态加载上下文相关能力
changes.evidence: 「Presets are now called Agents, and they're reused across chats... Raycast added Skills so you can give Raycast AI custom instructions and knowledge for the tasks you do often」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #5：Raycast 是同一 peripheral 赛道（launcher），Agent+Skills 架构正在向「不切焦点戳任何 session」的能力层靠拢

changes.description: 在 Raycast 中实时监控 Copilot coding agent 日志（3月上线）
changes.evidence: 「Monitor Copilot coding agent logs live in Raycast」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #5：不切换工具在 peripheral 层观察 agent 运行状态，与 meee2 菜单栏戳 session 的能力重叠

key_findings: Raycast 2.0 将 Presets 重命名为 Agents，明确向 agent 管理平台转型，同时扩展到 Windows
Raycast 已可在不切换工具的情况下监控 Copilot agent 实时日志——peripheral 层 agent 观察能力正在落地

competitors.name: Replit
competitors.raw_snapshot:
来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文

Replit Agent 4 (March 2026):
- "The fastest, most versatile Agent to date"
- Four pillars: Design Freely, Build Together, Ship Anything, Move Faster

Multi-Agent Parallel Execution:
- Multiple agents tackle different parts of a project simultaneously (authentication, database logic, backend, frontend)
- Agent 4 automatically breaks large tasks into smaller forks, runs concurrently using sub-agents, merges results with dedicated sub-agents

Collaborative Shared Sessions:
- Teammates can work in their own chat threads or collaborate in a shared session alongside the agent
- Multiple team members can submit requests simultaneously; agent intelligently sequences and executes in optimal order
- Every request broken into discrete tasks that run in the background with status tracking and approval before merging

Infinite Canvas:
- Built to close the gap between design and engineering
- Multi-select, hover/active state editing, hover-to-preview interactions, responsive overrides

Performance Claim:
- "Ship production-ready software up to 10x faster than before"
competitors.content_hash:
来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文

Replit Agent 4 (March 2026):
- "The fastest, most versatile Agent to date"
- Four pillars: Design Freely, Build Together, Ship Anything

changes.description: Agent 4 支持「共享 session 协作」：多人可在各自线程或共同 session 中与 agent 协作
changes.evidence: 「Teammates can work in their own chat threads or collaborate in a shared session alongside the agent」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：「shared session alongside the agent」——人与 AI 在同一 session 中协作，接近 meee2 的人=慢 session/AI=快 session 同协议框架

changes.description: 并行子 agent 架构：大任务自动分叉为并发子 agent，结果由专用子 agent 合并
changes.evidence: 「Agent 4 automatically breaks them into smaller forks, runs them concurrently using sub-agents, and merges the results, resolving any conflicts with dedicated sub-agents」

changes.description: 后台任务追踪 + 合并前审批：每个请求被拆解为后台任务，状态可追踪，合并前需审批
changes.evidence: 「Every request is broken into discrete tasks that run in the background with status tracking and approval before merging」

key_findings: Agent 4 引入「shared session alongside the agent」——多人+agent 在同一协作空间，为 md 竞品中与 meee2 锚点 #1 最接近的实现
并行子 agent 自动分叉+合并，后台任务追踪，Replit 在 coding workspace 赛道建立了完整的多 agent 执行框架

competitors.name: Superwhisper
competitors.raw_snapshot:
来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文

v2.13.0 (April 2026, macOS only):
- Claude Code and Open Code agent integration
- Integration pipes transcripts into the terminal agent
- Allows developers to control coding agents with voice commands rather than typing

Remote AI Model Support:

competitors.content_hash:
来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文

v2.13.0 (April 2026, macOS only):
- Claude Code and Open Code agent integration
- Integration pipes transcripts into the termin

changes.description: Claude Code / Open Code agent 集成（4月 v2.13.0）：语音转录直接 pipe 进 terminal agent
changes.evidence: 「Superwhisper added Claude Code and Open Code agent integration in v2.13.0... The integration pipes transcripts into the terminal agent, allowing developers to control coding agents with voice commands」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #5 边缘：声音 → terminal agent 的 peripheral 接入，方向与 meee2 菜单栏戳 session 平行但实现路径不同

key_findings: Superwhisper 与 Claude Code 集成，声音成为 terminal agent 输入层——peripheral 语音接入路径逐渐清晰

alerts.headline: Live Artifacts 正式实现「artifact live link 非 snapshot」，直接触碰 meee2 锚点 #2
alerts.evidence: 「dashboards and trackers that refresh with current data every time you reopen them, staying connected to data sources」
alerts.action_suggestion: 紧急评估：Live Artifacts 的数据源连接协议是否与 meee2 的 live link 实现路径冲突或可借鉴。同时 Artifacts 通过 MCP 连接外部工具也触碰锚点 #4（跨工具 artifact pull）。meee2 需要明确差异化：live link 的「跨工具跨 owner」维度是否已足够清晰，是否能覆盖 Claude.ai 做不到的跨 session 场景。

alerts.headline: /multitask 命令让开发者并行运行多个异步子 agent，AI 并发 session 能力作为一等公民暴露
alerts.evidence: 「/multitask command for running async subagents to parallelize requests」
alerts.action_suggestion: 观察 /multitask 的实际使用模式：开发者如何在实践中协调多个并发 agent session？重点关注 Cursor 是否后续提供 session 状态可视化界面。若出现类似 meee2 的 session 观察层，威胁等级需上调。

alerts.headline: JetBrains IDE 引入「统一 sessions 视图」，首次将 running/queued agent session 状态显式暴露在工具层
alerts.evidence: 「unified sessions view that shows live status for running and queued sessions」
alerts.action_suggestion: 高度关注此 sessions 视图的演化方向：当前仅显示 agent session（无人类 session）。若扩展为跨工具统一面板或引入人类 session 显示，将直接竞争 meee2 的 session 可视化层。持续跟踪是否从 JetBrains 扩展到其他 IDE 或独立面板。

alerts.headline: Linear Skills「从对话 emerge 出可复用工作流」——对 meee2 descriptive-first 范式的直接挑战
alerts.evidence: 「When a conversation gets you to a good result, you can ask Linear to save it as a reusable skill, which is especially useful for recurring workflows」
alerts.action_suggestion: 评估 Linear Skills 与 meee2 descriptive canvas 的差异：Linear 的实现局限于 issue tracking 工作流（项目管理语义），meee2 的 descriptive-first 是跨工具跨 session 的通用结构。需确保 meee2 在「从行为 emerge 结构」这一核心叙事上保持更广泛的定位清晰度，避免被误读为「项目管理工具」。
